name: ITS_primer_5.8S_anchor
description: Fungal ITS conserved anchor / primer '5.8S_anchor' (length 28 bp). Consensus: CGCTTTGGCGCATCGATGAAGAACGTAG. Conserved 5.8S anchor between ITS1 and ITS2. Conserved across Fungi at sub-1% mismatch; mapper should NOT tolerate high mismatch.
sources: White 1990 PCR Protocols (ITS1, ITS2, ITS3, ITS4)
